calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-04-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: L. Bura/Sajja, CSR: Linda Chavez.
Petitioner: Gregory Pierre Elarms, was not present. Petitioner's mother: Shirley Martin, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Ms. Martin stated to the court that the petitioner is incarcerated.
After reviewing the petition and hearing the sworn testimony of petitioner's mother, the request to change name was DENIED without prejudice.
Order denying the request was signed in open court.
